title: Ren Bridge - Open App
meta_description: ren bridge opens the official RenBridge app to review supported cross-chain mint and burn routes before connecting a wallet.
hero_h2: Review RenVM routes for native cross-chain movement
hero_lead: ren bridge is the official RenBridge route for opening the legacy RenVM interface, reviewing supported assets, and connecting only after you verify the domain.
what_is: RenBridge is the Ren project’s bridge UI for RenVM, a system historically used to mint and burn representations such as renBTC across chains. The Ren Resource Center documents RenVM, RenJS, Darknodes, and developer resources.

how.d: Use the official domain and confirm the URL before connecting any wallet.
Select the asset, source network, and destination network shown as available in the interface.
Check destination address, wallet network, confirmations, gas, and any route-specific notices.
Approve only the expected transaction, then track source and destination confirmations.

points.p: The public bridge-v2 repository identifies bridge.renproject.io as the RenBridge app domain.
RenVM was designed for cross-chain asset movement, including mint and burn flows for wrapped representations such as renBTC.
Routes, assets, and availability can change, so rely on the live app state and official project resources instead of old screenshots or third-party mirrors.

faq.a: ren bridge is commonly used to refer to RenBridge, the Ren project’s app interface for RenVM cross-chain asset flows.

faq.q: Is ren bridge the official app?
faq.a: The official app domain referenced by the RenBridge source repository is bridge.renproject.io; verify the domain before connecting.

faq.q: What can I move with ren bridge?
faq.a: Historically, RenVM supported mint and burn routes for assets such as BTC into representations like renBTC, but current availability should be checked in the app.

faq.q: Does ren bridge show fees before signing?
faq.a: Use the app review screen to inspect route details, network gas, and transaction prompts before approving anything; this page does not quote live fees.

faq.q: What if ren bridge does not load?
faq.a: Do not use look-alike domains. Check official Ren documentation and the source repository for current project references.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify bridge.renproject.io before connecting; educational content, not financial advice.
